underlying_goal: Design a Hearts card game with AI opponents using MCTS, integrated into an existing game framework, through a collaborative interview process resulting in a written design spec
friction_detail: The visual companion server timed out once and needed restarting; one set of card asset links was dead.
brief_summary: User wanted to collaboratively design a Hearts card game with MCTS AI opponents through an interview process, and successfully produced an approved design spec covering rules, state, UI, MCTS integration, and testing.
